mapper.sql: SELECT mar.id, mar.rule_name, mar.alarm_type, mar.alarm_level, mar.compare_operator, mar.threshold_value, mar.scope_type, mar.server_id, ms.server_ip, ms.hostname, mar.silent_minutes, mar.enabled, mar.del_flag, mar.remark, mar.create_by, mar.create_time, mar.update_by, mar.update_time FROM monitor_alarm_rule mar LEFT JOIN monitor_server ms ON ms.id = mar.server_id AND ms.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: WHERE mar.del_flag = '0' AND mar.enabled = '0' AND (mar.scope_type = '0' OR (mar.scope_type = '1' AND mar.server_id = #{serverId})) ORDER BY mar.alarm_level DESC, mar.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_alarm_rule( rule_name, alarm_type, alarm_level, compare_operator, threshold_value, scope_type, server_id, silent_minutes, enabled, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{ruleName}, #{alarmType}, #{alarmLevel}, #{compareOperator}, #{thresholdValue}, #{scopeType}, #{serverId}, #{silentMinutes}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE monitor_alarm_rule SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE monitor_alarm_rule SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id IN
#{id}
